programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el cuerpo de un teniente de la marina al que le falta un ojo, llevándoles al mundo de las luchas enjauladas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan la muerte de un intruso en Quantico, Jimmy y Kasie se ven expuestos a una biotoxina mortal y deben pedir ayuda a la doctora Carol Wilson para encontrar el antídoto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está persiguiendo a un sospechoso en Phoenix que está secuestrando víctimas con insomnio. Además, Hotch y García se enfrentan a la amenaza del grupo de sicarios clandestinos, llamados“La docena sucia.”

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de dos agentes encubiertos de la DEA y la desaparición de un tercero, el UAC se suma a la NSA para investigar si una red clandestina de drogas por Internet está involucrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan la muerte de un intruso en Quantico, Jimmy y Kasie se ven expuestos a una biotoxina mortal y deben pedir ayuda a la doctora Carol Wilson para encontrar el antídoto.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the final qualifiers selected for this year's Run For A Million, it's back to the ranches as the McCutcheon dynasty gets back to business. After missing the qualifier, Abby Lengel must begin the process of trying to get back into the competition.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Andrea, Matt, and Craig share the struggles and joys of the sport they love while training some of the next generation's brightest reining stars -- their children.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The competitors test their best Run For A Million prospects at the NRBC in Katy, TX. Some riders are sliding away with big checks while others are realizing they might not have the caliber of horse they will need to take the top prize in Vegas.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the Run for a Million just around the corner, the top riders meet at the NHRA Derby for one final test before Vegas. The underdogs are out to prove they are a force to be reckoned with against the top contenders.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Eight modern-day cowboys and cowgirls train to compete for the first-ever million-dollar prize in horse reining, one of the toughest and most dangerous sports in the world.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: As the riders prepare for the Cactus Classic, Matt struggles when his horse has health issues, and Abby feels the pressure in her first competition since going solo.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Leading up to the Run for a Million show, Andrea undercuts Matt's search for the perfect horse, Abby deals with a flooded practice arena, and Craig seeks a much-needed payday.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: At the National Reining Breeders Classic, Jason has a chance to prove his skills equal Andrea's, and Cade has to come through in the clutch.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Abby faces a tough decision, Casey deals with mounting home-construction costs, and the pressure rises as the riders choose the horses they'll take to Run for a Million.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: In the first annual Run for a Million in Las Vegas, the riders compete for the first-ever million-dollar purse in horse-reining history.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Jeff Crane drives specially refrigerated medical supplies across the country. Watch as the Chrome Shop Mafia turns his old truck into a dream come true.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: The Chrome Shop Mafia learned of Mark Haven, and they now want to give this selfless hero the truck he never had.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Roger Ozbun is a hero to his family, and together they seek out the Chrome Shop Mafia for help. Don't miss it, as the Mafia turns the truck into a tribute to the American Old West

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Watch the Chrome Shop Mafia turn Mike's old Peterbilt into a tribute to his family's heritage; an American Classic throwback to the 1940s. Only the Mafia can pull it off.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Darlene Swift is a cult hero among truck drivers. Don't miss it as the Mafia turns her rundown Freightliner into a truck built for a queen.

programme.title: Trick My Truck
programme.desc: Mike Lopardo has a passion for truck driving that he passed on to his son John. Tune in as the Mafia turns it into the street rod truck that Mike and John have always wanted.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/15/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the Crow Reservation, hunts with podcast host Joe Rogan and eats dinner at Butte institution Lydia’s Supper Club.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/07/2017. What’s the best way to protect paradise? In stunning Patagonia, an American conservationist has purchased vast tracts of land to the fury of local developers.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/14/2017. As deforestation rages and unique species vanish, the fight is on to save one of the planet’s most special places before it is ruined forever.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/21/2017. As sea levels rise, the sunken city of Heracleion sounds a stark warning of the growing threat faced by the planet’s teeming coastal cities.

programme.title: Pope: The Most Powerful Man in History
programme.desc: Aired 03/11/2018. The papacy and Catholicism spread throughout Europe against all odds.

programme.title: Pope: The Most Powerful Man in History
programme.desc: Aired 03/18/2018. Examine the resignations of popes throughout history, alongside the nature of the pope’s power.

programme.title: Pope: The Most Powerful Man in History
programme.desc: Aired 03/25/2018. Corruption increases as popes acquire temporal power and political influence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Oklahoma man's effort to evade units goes up in flames, officers use a beanbag gun on an armed suspect, and deputies intervene in a couple's grocery dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies chase a wanted man who makes a break for it, a man leads officers on a vehicle pursuit, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A white-knuckled police chase ends in a dramatic escape and an unsettling officer injury. An intoxicated prowler is reported after a woman spots him in a tree. Officers bring in the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspicious van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a suspended license flees a routine traffic stop on foot. Deputies respond to a battered woman after receiving a 911 hang up call. A sting operation nets a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy Tasers after a suspect tries to flee, a man denies committing a crime in front of detectives, and an officer supervises a chaotic business transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.desc: Daphne is touched when Frasier agrees to pay for her wedding -- but aghast when he takes control of all the plans.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier vows revenge after a pair of radio "shock jocks" embarrass him in a series of on-air pranks.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Jealous of Niles' position as the arts critic for a snobby magazine, Frasier goes all out in his bid to host a cultural program on his radio station.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz hires Bulldog to babysit her daughter, not realizing he's out to bulldoze her social life.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles crank their sibling rivalry up a notch when each believes the other is trying to steal his girlfriend.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After a family heirloom is linked to the Romanoff's, Frasier and Niles giddily assume they are descended from royalty.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An erroneous report that Frasier has died motivates him to do a makeover on his life.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Lilith visits Seattle over Thanksgiving, Frederick conspires to reunite his parents.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Looped on pain medication for his ailing back, Frasier makes a startling announcement to Daphne.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Knowing Niles loves her, Daphne is forced to confront how she really feels about him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Frasier and Niles' New Year's plans fall through, they take a riotous road trip with Martin in his Winnebago.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's attempt to write a simple theme song for his show turns into a major production for he and Martin.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla takes over as bartender when Woody takes his position as city councilman.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca uses her classical music knowledge to woo Kelly's wealthy father.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca makes a fool out of herself at Mr. Gaines' exclusive party.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Despite Rebecca's rich taste in men, she falls for a local plumber.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam gets an unexpected visit from his ex-flame and Cheers favorite, Diane.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Reconciliation comes for Sam and Diane after an unexpected turn of events.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane are plagued with doubts about getting back together.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane Chambers makes her home at Cheers when her fiancé leaves her.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane can't conceal her scorn for Sam's parade of beautiful, yet shallow dates, and puts him on the defensive about his taste in women.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane suggests Carla consult a psychologist to learn to control her temper.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's sportscaster friend wants to feature him on his television show.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Nobody believes Frasier when he claims to be dating a famous supermodel.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The sibling rivalry between Frasier and Niles reaches a fever pitch when they try and "top" each other's 65th birthday gift to their father, Martin.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles' Halloween costume party becomes a comedy of errors when he mistakenly thinks that Daphne is pregnant -- and Frasier's the father.

programme.title: Crónica de un Cobarde
programme.desc: Juan, casado con María y dueño del rancho La Troja, es asaltado y rescatado por Tomás. Al regresar, descubre que su padre ha sido asesinado por un forastero. Decidido a vengarlo, sigue la pista dejada: una espuela que pertenece a Tomás.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: El primer gran robo al tren
programme.desc: Durante el siglo XIX, tres hombres conspiran para realizar el robo de un tren que lleva una fortuna. Sean Connery, Lesley-Anne Down, Donald Sutherland, Alan Webb, Robert Lang.

programme.title: Temple de acero
programme.desc: Una obstinada joven (Kim Darby) contrata al cascarrabias Rooster para buscar al hombre que asesinó a su padre y huyó con los ahorros familiares.

programme.title: La Vida No Vale Nada
programme.desc: Con una perspectiva un poco fatalista sobre la naturaleza humana y la búsqueda de la felicidad a través del amor, Pablo experimenta de manera cínica algunas relaciones sin éxito.

programme.title: Hasta el viento tiene miedo
programme.desc: Tras un frustrado intento de suicidio, Claudia es internada en un singular centro de apoyo para adolescentes con problemas emocionales, regido por la inflexible psiquiatra Bernarda Alquicira.

programme.title: El último castillo
programme.desc: Sus servicios al país lo hicieron un héroe pero un error lo convirtió en prisionero. Para el General Eugene Irwin (Robert Redford) es solo cuestión de cumplir su sentencia, hasta que descubre que otros presos están siendo asesinados.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: El callejón
programme.desc: Rosa es atrapada por un asesino en serie en una lavandería desierta escondida en un oscuro callejón. Después de horas de un sádico juego del gato y el ratón, descubre algo aún más perturbador sobre su agresor.

programme.title: Sin rastros
programme.desc: Unas vacaciones familiares toman un giro terrible cuando la hija de una pareja desaparece sin dejar rastro. A medida que crece la lista de sospechosos, la búsqueda por la verdad los lleva a descubrir algo sorprendente.

programme.title: Yo Soy La Salsa
programme.desc: Más que un género musical, la salsa fue un movimiento cultural que surgió de los barrios más humildes del Caribe.

programme.title: El callejón
programme.desc: Rosa es atrapada por un asesino en serie en una lavandería desierta escondida en un oscuro callejón. Después de horas de un sádico juego del gato y el ratón, descubre algo aún más perturbador sobre su agresor.

programme.title: John Grisham's: el poder de la justicia
programme.desc: Matt Damon es Rudy Baylor, un abogado novato superado por un caso de alto perfil. En su contra, un ejército de tiburones de la ley. De su lado, Deck Shifflet, un batallador "para-abogado" que nunca consiguió obtener su título.

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: Cuando la despreocupada Lucy (Kate Hudson) al fin conoce a su hombre perfecto, Adam (Stuart Townsend), está lista para sentar cabeza de verdad. Pero mientras Lucy está ocupada planeando la boda, Adam está ocupado ¡encantando al resto de su familia!

programme.title: Fama
programme.desc: Fama es la inspiradora historia de un grupo de bailarines, cantantes, músicos y actores de la Escuela Secundaria de Artes Escénicas de la Ciudad de Nueva York, y su enérgico impulso por hacer realidad sus sueños de estrellato.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: La mejor Navidad
programme.desc: Gloria, enfocada en su trabajo en Miami después de su divorcio, envía a sus hijos a pasar la Navidad con su exmarido en Jalisco. Lo que no imaginan es que esta decisión les va a cambiar la vida.

programme.title: La boda de mi ex
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar, Anna Paquin y Katie Holmes, lideran un reparto estelar en The Romantics: una “comedia dramática” generacional sobre la amistad, la rivalidad y la lealtad.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: Rambo II: la misión
programme.desc: John Rambo is enviado a una misión al sureste de Asia para rastrear a unos prisioneros de guerra, pero termina enfrentando a soldados vietnamitas que resguardan los campos.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo se rehúsa a unirse a su amigo y antiguo mentor, el coronel Trautman en una misión en Afganistán. La misión falla y Trautman es capturado por tropas rusas. Ahora Rambo debe infiltrarse a la fortaleza rusa y salvar a su único amigo.

programme.title: CAOS
programme.desc: Dos policías, un novato (Phillippe) y un veterano de cabellos grises (Statham), persiguen a un hábil ladrón de bancos (Snipes).

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Un policía fuerte (Jason Statham, "Fast & Furious 7") es designado para atrapar a un asesino en serie que ataca a oficiales de policía. Con Paddy Considine, Aiden Gillen, Mark Rylance y Luke Evans.

programme.title: El hombre sin pasado
programme.desc: Un tranquilo cuidador en una casa de empeño, con un pasado violento, se enfrenta a una red de tráfico de drogas y órganos con la esperanza de salvar a una niña que es su única amiga.

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: La Fortaleza
programme.desc: Tras el colapso económico de Venezuela, el alcohólico en recuperación Roque, trata de cambiar su vida reconstruyendo un hotel abandonado en la selva amazónica; pero el encanto de la minería ilegal de oro amenaza con hacer fracasar sus sueños.

programme.title: Divina confusión
programme.desc: Comedia mexicana llena de estrellas donde el amor de hoy en día recibe un empujoncito por parte de poderes de lo más alto.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: El último exorcismo: Parte II
programme.desc: Nell está de nuevo en la seguridad de la civilización y es enviada a vivir en una casa de acogida, donde se la anima a dejar atrás su pasado e iniciar una nueva vida.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Cuando su amigo hacker accidentalmente canaliza una misteriosa señal inalámbrica, un grupo de estudiantes se reúnen para detener a un terrible mal que se apodera del mundo.

programme.title: Amor y monstruos
programme.desc: En un mundo lleno de monstruos, Joel (Dylan O’Brien) se entera de que su amor de la secundaria (Jessica Henwick) está a 130 kilómetros. Ahora, deberá sacar a su héroe interior y enfrentar peligros desconocidos para estar con la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: Wishmaster: el genio del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un apreciador de joyas recibe una gema antigua, sin saberlo, desata un espíritu inmortal que concede deseos a los humanos a cambio de sus almas.

programme.title: 666: The Child
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: Del director ganador del Óscar, Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER), llega una batalla, el hombre y la naturaleza. El milagro de la ingeniería creado en el laboratorio evolucionó y comenzó a imitar al depredador más peligroso de todos: el humano.

programme.title: La reliquia
programme.desc: Entren, si se atreven. La gala inaugural de una nueva exhibición en el museo de historia natural de Chicago está por comenzar. Pero tengan cuidado porque algo aterrador quiere asegurarse de que nadie pueda irse.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el fantasma?
programme.desc: Cuando la novia de Malcolm (Marlon Wayans) se muda a su casa, pronto descubre que el amor de su vida está poseído por un espíritu maligno. Malcolm busca la ayuda del padre Williams (Cedric the Entertainer) para expulsar al demonio de su novia.

programme.title: Superhéroes: la película
programme.desc: A un adolescente huérfano le muerde una libélula radioactiva, dándole poderes sobrehumanos en esta parodia de películas como ‘Spider-Man’, ‘X-Men’ y ‘Los cuatro fantásticos’.

programme.title: Resaca mortal
programme.desc: Después de celebrar la próxima boda de Doug en un hotel en Laughlin, Nevada, los chicos con resaca Bradley, Ed y Zach se despiertan en una distopía futurista, al haber perdido a su amigo, Doug.

programme.title: La fuerza del amor
programme.desc: Jason Bateman es un ambicioso empresario a punto de vender su exitosa compañía de extractos de sabores hasta que ocurre un extraño accidente laboral. Con diálogos graciosos y comedia estrafalaria, se saborea un 100% de pura diversión.

programme.title: Torrente 5
programme.desc: El policía corrupto sale de la cárcel en el 2018 para encontrar una España diferente a la que conocía.

programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: Un sociópata se lía a cometer crímenes a diestro y siniestro en Miami y se enrolla con una prostituta confiada, mientras da esquinazo a un policía algo torpe.

programme.title: Ponchao
programme.desc: Alex is destined to become the greatest baseball player ever — and he'll do anything to make it happen. But the road to success proves to be hilariously unpredictable. Subtitled.

programme.title: Un crucero de locura
programme.desc: Un joven comediante en apuros toma un trabajo simple en un crucero, donde espera tener su gran oportunidad para triunfar en el mundo de la comedia en cruceros.

programme.title: Flame Of Barbary Coast
programme.desc: A cowboy competes with a gambling tycoon on the Barbary Coast for the hand of a beautiful dance-hall queen.

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates, and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: Paris Blues
programme.desc: Ram (Paul Newman) and Eddie (Sidney Poitier) are two expatriate jazz musicians living in Paris, where their music is celebrated. When they fall in love with two vacationing American girls, they must decide if they should move back to America with them.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: The Fortune Cookie
programme.desc: In their very first screen pairing, Walter Matthau (who would win a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his performance) and Jack Lemmon portray a crooked lawyer and his TV cameraman brother-in-law in this madcap tale of greed and recouping lost love.

programme.title: Irma La Douce
programme.desc: Set in Paris' famous Red Light district, a rookie policeman (Jack Lemmon) plots to keep a beautiful prostitute (Shirley MacLaine) all to himself in this hit comedy from director Billy Wilder.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: The Reivers
programme.desc: From the Pulitzer Prize-Winning novel by William Faulkner, Steve McQueen stars in the story of a Mississippi boy who drives to Memphis with two rascals in his family's new car—a 1905 Winton Flyer.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Klink and the Gestapo that the war is over so that they will release some prisoners.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps Klink prepare for a hasty trip to Argentina when he finds himself in a duel.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Using the German propaganda radio network,Hogan gets information to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps an escapee go out of camp in a balloon.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: LeBeau says that he keeps rendezvousing with a little old lady who is actually young and beautiful.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has trouble trying to get thirty prisoners out of camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A collection of stolen art comes to Stalag 13 and Hogan decides to steal it back for the Allies.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a few days before Oliver (Eddie Albert)'s birthday, and Lisa (Eva Gabor) doesn't know quite what to get him…until the old Hoyt Clagwell goes kerflooey! So, she goes out and buys the biggest and fanciest tractor she can find.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that Eb (Tom Lester) has a way with sick animals after Eb cures Arnold, the pig, and Alice, the chicken, and offers to put him through veterinary college. But will life in Green Acres ever be the same without Ed?!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A horse follows Oliver (Eddie Albert) home, but every time he tries to show it to his wife, the horse disappears. Lisa (Eva Gabor) assumes that her husband is imagining things…and as more animals show up, Oliver begins to think so too.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) takes Oliver (Eddie Albert) to Pixley Superior Municipal Court and sues him for non-payment of a vital contract over the little matter of some rain…or lack thereof. Does Mr. Haney know who he's up against? Does Oliver?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Third-Tuesday-of-Every-Month-Culture-Committee of the Every-Other-Wednesday-Afternoon-Discussion-Club decides that Hooterville needs some culture in the form of a symphony orchestra. And Lisa (Eva Gabor) may just know the perfect conductor.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's (Eddie Albert) nephew Charles (Don Edmonds) arrives for a visit, and Oliver is completely shaken up when the boy turns out to be a long-haired, motorcycle-ridin', hippy-dippy type. But, boy, does he know a thing or two about engines.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Cousin Liz dies, Edith and Archie learn more about her than they ever thought. When a roomate of Liz, Veronica, comes out of the closet to Edith, she also admits that she was more than just roomates with Liz.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie must delay his weekend fishing trip with Barney when Edith announces that she has invited people from the SunShine Home to attend an elderly couple's wedding at 704 on the same day Archie planned to leave.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Kelsey finally decides to sell his bar, nothing will stop Archie from getting it--even if it means forging Edith's signature against her will.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is upset when she discovers Archie has forged her signature to get the bar. But Mike will influence Mrs. Bunker to change her mind.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria, Mike, and Archie plan for Edith 50th birthday surprise party at the Stivics house. Edith comes home while Archie and the Stivics leave. A knock at the door reveals a cop who claims that there's a rapist in town but he slips out that it's him.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Edith tells the story to the family in tears, Gloria and Mike believe she should report to the police. Gloria gets a call from the policemen asking her to identify the rapist. Edith is afraid, but Archie takes Edith to the police station.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Carol's beguiling ex-husband suddenly turns on the charm and captivates the Findlay household, Maude and Carol are astounded to discover his motives.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur is determined to teach his visiting grandson the important things in life, but it's the guilty grandpa who learns the most valuable lesson of all.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Victoria Butterfield's self-righteous father comes to take her away from the 'permissive' Findlay household, Maude confronts him with his less-than-honorable secret. Roscoe Lee Browne returns in the guest star role of Mr. Butterfield.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's grandson Phillip is devastated when he finally finds out the real reason why an 'older woman' has been dating him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When a young beauty queen contestant, Dina Raines (Diane Almeida), commits suicide, Sparta Police Chief Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) and Virgil Tibbs (Howard Rollins) investigate the background of the contestant and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A woman murders her wealthy, abusive husband with the help of her lover. All appear to be working according to their plan until the initial evidence points to her stepson as the main suspect; however, as more evidence emerges, the focus shifts.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Christine Rankin, the first Black female officer on the Sparta police force, is killed during the capture of a murder suspect, the city council makes plans to suspend Gillespie, but he voluntarily steps down and sets out to get justice.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A small-time hoodlum tries to eliminate the competition and open the way for a mainland crime syndicate to operate in Hawaii.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A strangler murders five women, leaving each wearing a blonde wig and their faces garishly made up. Monte Markham guest stars as Jerry Rhoades, a private investigator whose wife is among the victims, and who has joined McGarrett's search for the criminal.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Buddy Ebsen guest stars as a cunning college professor who plots an elaborate scheme to cash $750,000 worth of stolen travelers' checks.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Vic Morrow guest stars as Edward Heron, a tourist in Hawaii, who, after being mugged and hospitalized, becomes the object of McGarrett's suspicions when he refuses to press charges and disappears from the hospital.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A psychotic sniper endangers the lives of motorists as he fires at cars from a hillside bunker overlooking a major highway.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett, while investigating the death of an airport security undercover agent, comes upon an air cargo hijacking ring.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Five upstanding citizens seek their own revenge through a criminal act — the theft of $6 million. The precision and elaborate planning employed by the group make their scheme a seemingly perfect crime, even to the Five-O investigation team.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Jackie Cooper guest stars as Dr. Alex Southmore, who becomes a suspect in the investigation of his wife's murder when McGarrett finds holes in the confessed killer's story.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett receives calls and clues from a man saying he will kill somebody important in 48 hours. His only clue to the identity of the victim: a key sent by the anonymous assailant.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett fears a gangland war is imminent when it seems a mainland syndicate is trying to take over criminal operations. Criminal operations up to this time have been under the control of four unfriendly families.

programme.title: Kung Fu

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Huellas entre ladrones
programme.desc: El asesinato de un excéntrico millonario no fue del todo inesperado; alardeaba de su riqueza y se preocupaba poco por la seguridad personal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Fear takes over for the new Training Camp Candidates as they face the reality of doing the DCC kick line & jump splits for the first time. Dreams come true if only temporarily, as the girls try on the uniform for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To be a DCC, you need to look like a DCC. This week Kelli makes sure all the girls have the look. The final rehearsal of the week brings emotions to the forefront as a girl gets sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the candidates enter the sixth week of training camp they need to start looking like a DCC or their spot is in jeopardy. Melissa Rycroft and former DCC Tina Kalina sit in for Judy and give Kelli some fresh eyes.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With three girls left to cut and the first game around the corner, the pressure is intense as the girls return to AT&T Stadium to take the field for the first time since auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final day of training camp has everyone nervous because Kelli and Judy might take a squad of less than 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This season 400 hundred girls that have dared to dream they can become a world-famous Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, put it all on the line, as preliminary auditions for the 2015-2016 season begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As Training Camp starts Kelli lays down the law. Girls start to crack as the reality of how hard it is to become a DCC sets in. Melissa Rycroft offers hope and advice on how to make it through.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the girls get the DCC look, it helps some and not others. Two surprise guests stop by rehearsal and rock the DCC's world. Kelli has one of the most awkward office visits of all time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Cameos and Show Group auditions push the new girls and vets to their limits. Melissa Rycroft tries to save a DCC that's hanging by a thread and there is a shocking outcome from a Kelli office visit.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emotions are supercharged as Kelli & Judy make a lot of tough cuts to keep up the quality of the team. Melissa Rycroft offers invaluable field experience.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli finally announces the squad. Injuries threaten the opening of Cowboys training camp. Game Day chaos endangers a flawless performance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented hopefuls arrive to try out for the best cheerleading team in the world, while many of the returning girls are looking for redemption. New judges increase the pressure of moving on to Finals.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a healthy 31-year-old father of three dies suddenly, an autopsy reveals poisoning by antifreeze.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a mother is murdered in a home invasion the day before her best friend is shot outside the place they both worked, investigators suspect the crimes are linked.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of Spokane, Wash., businessman exposes a web of malevolence extending from the Pacific Northwest to a North Dakota oil field.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The five-year investigation into the death of a retired corrections officer, who was killed by antifreeze poisoning, reveals multiple suspects.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a South Carolina coroner arrives at the scene of a car accident to find his friend deceased, he notices some unusual markings on her face and begins to think her death looks suspicious.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Georgia couple's romantic tryst takes a deadly turn, leaving investigators stumped -- until tire treads at the scene and cell phone calls reveal a twisted plot.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A risky undercover operation in a rough prison could expose a suspected serial killer's secrets.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a healthy 31-year-old father of three dies suddenly, an autopsy reveals poisoning by antifreeze.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Kathleen Schroll makes a phone call right before her death where she identifies her killer, which leads to an arrest. Two trials and 12 years later, authorities begin to wonder who was really the victim.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A hunting safari in Zambia's Kafue National Park ends in a nightmare when a shot rings out from the cabin of dentist Dr. Larry Rudolph and his wife Bianca.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Lester Holt spends two nights locked up and embedded inside the largest maximum security prison in America, the notorious Louisiana State Penitentiary, also known as Angola.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The security cameras at the home of a wife and mother of three's home may hold the key to solving the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Lyin The Witch And The Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for someone who can be a mother as well as a mate, so he has the girls create a bedtime story for a group of children.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Halitosis Ohmyosis
programme.desc: Flav challenges the final six girls to a calendar shoot showing off the bodies of the year.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: Not all matches are made in heaven.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: It really is that simple.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: Ohio boys sweep Los Angeles girls off their feet.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: The Baker boys have a lot of love to give.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: What happens when a blind mum who runs a strict home swaps with a liberal mum who leads a hectic life?

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: Expect fireworks in this week's dramatic Wife Swap, as things don't quite go to plan when a mother of ten swaps lives with a career mum who runs a sweet shop.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: What happens when a traditional country mum swaps lives with a working mum who doesn't believe in rules or discipline?

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. Today, a dater must choose between men whose baggage includes believing he was probed by aliens and being a competitive cheerleader.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. Today, a dater must choose between women whose baggage includes spending 5 hours a week in the salon and sleeping in her bathtub.

programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. Today, a dater must choose between men whose baggage includes still sleeping with his baby blanket and owing $2,000 in parking tickets.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie’s retail therapy goes awry when Marco finds his credit card maxed out. Ellie rescues him this time, but Marco realizes a new job is the real solution—and might even give him the opportunity to meet new people.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny and Jay’s faux-mance is working perfectly. But when Jay gets too serious, Manny reminds him it's all fake.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Manny discovers that her University demo reel is actually a sex tape that she and Jay made, her future hangs in the balance. By the time Jay catches up to her with the correct DVD, it's too late.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s finally been granted a spot on Spirit Squad, and she’s ecstatic. But trying to be a normal teenager is proving a difficult balancing act.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Scientists investigate the meteorite impact responsible for the extinction of dinosaurs. According to a theory, the event was triggered by a comet hitting the present-day Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1980, Michigan resident Shannon Mohr died in what her new husband, David Davis, reported to be a horseback riding accident. After her death, Shannon's family reported that Davis seemed far from grief-stricken.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a human skull retrieved from an Ohio pond reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate that the victim had been stabbed multiple times and that the teeth had been removed with needle-nose pliers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman and her daughter didn't return home from shopping, her husband directed police to a nearby mall. The child's body was found, but there was no sign of the wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.desc: Erica's pregnancy is reaching full term but Safaree's new album threatens to pull him away. Jim shows Mama Jones her new house. PHresher has to settle his debt with Jada before Jenn finds out. Remy's legal fate is revealed.
